description_long: This radiator features a rectangular, flat panel design with a series of evenly spaced horizontal slats forming the main heat-dissipating surface. The slats are slightly raised from the main body, creating a layered effect that enhances airflow. A small valve or control mechanism is visible at the lower left corner, suggesting manual operation. The radiator is encased in a solid, smooth frame with clean, modern lines and a matte finish. The back is completely flat, indicating it is designed to be mounted flush against a wall. The overall appearance is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or utility spaces.
description: A modern, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal slats and a smooth, rectangular frame, featuring a small control valve at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal slats, main heat-dissipating surface, and a small valve at the lower left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's slim profile and the protrusion of the slatted section from the flat back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely flat, featureless surface for wall mounting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the depth of the slatted section.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at bottom left, horizontally oriented
